name: Granary
note: Stores grain for the lean weeks. (Starter — no tech required.)

name: Trading Post
note: Roadside stall. (Starter — no tech required.)

name: Hunter's Lodge
note: Requires Foraging. Game and pelts.

name: Watchtower
note: Requires Town Watch. Visible safety calms the settlement.

name: Mill
note: Requires Mill + Farming. Grinds grain and saws lumber off the same wheel.

name: Tavern
note: Requires Beer Brewing. Cheap drink, loud songs.

name: Library
note: Requires Reading. Shelf, ledger, lamp.

name: Pottery
note: Requires Ceramics. Pots for storage, jugs for sale.

name: Smokehouse
note: Requires Cooking. Cured meat keeps spirits up through winter.

name: Stables
note: Requires Horseback Riding. Mounts ready when needed.

name: Walls
note: Requires Walls. Stout earthworks rimming the village.

name: Forge
note: Requires Smithing. The soldiers thank the forgemen.

name: Quarry Camp
note: Requires Mining. Stone hauled out daily.

name: Apothecary
note: Requires Chemistry. Tinctures the priests would frown at.

name: Market
note: Requires Markets. The day the merchants open is the day the streets fill.

name: Mint
note: Requires Currency. Stamps a coin you can trust.

name: Workshop
note: Requires Apprenticeship. Tools beget tools.

name: Armory
note: Requires Armor. Racks of plate and shield.

name: Barracks
note: Requires Tactics. Drill ground and a roof for the spears.

name: Garrison
note: Requires Logistics. Beds, mess, drill — all under one roof.

name: Aqueduct
note: Requires Plumbing. Clean water at every fountain.

name: Print Shop
note: Requires Printing. Pamphlets, ledgers, broadsheets.

name: Counting House
note: Requires Banking. Ledgers thick enough to stop a knife.

name: Cathedral
note: Requires Religion + Masonry. Stained glass, taller than memory.

name: School
note: Requires Pedagogy + Library. Where the next generation overtakes the last.

name: Tower
note: Requires Walls + Masonry. Tall enough to see the whole valley.

name: Fortress
note: Requires Walls + Plate Armor. A keep thick enough to last a siege.

name: Ironworks
note: Requires Smelting. Bigger billets, bigger blades.

name: Palace
note: Requires Leadership + Architecture. The chief's actual house.

name: Citadel
note: Requires Walls + Engineering. Headquarters on a hill.
